use_ssl.label: Use Ssl
use_ssl.description: True for implicit SSL (port 465). For STARTTLS (587), leave False.

use_starttls.label: Use Starttls
use_starttls.description: Issue STARTTLS upgrade on a plain connection (port 587).

password_env_var.label: Password Env Var
password_env_var.description: Env var with SMTP password (Gmail: app password).

sender.label: Sender
sender.description: From address. Either bare 'alerts@me.com' or display form 'Pipeline Bot <alerts@me.com>'. Many providers reject mismatch with the auth user.

mode.label: Mode
mode.description: 'per_row': one email per upstream row, using row fields in templates. 'summary': one email per run, with all rows rendered in the body via summary_template.

to_template.label: To Template
to_template.description: Recipient template — `{column}` placeholders against upstream row. Example: '{user_email}' or 'alerts@me.com,team@me.com' (literal list).

html_body_template.label: Html Body Template
html_body_template.description: Optional HTML body. If both are set, recipient sees text/html alternative.

summary_template.label: Summary Template
summary_template.description: For mode='summary', a template rendered against the whole DataFrame's row summary (use Markdown — gets rendered into the body as text).

attachment_path_columns.label: Attachment Path Columns
attachment_path_columns.description: Columns whose values are local file paths to attach. Per row in per_row mode; in summary mode, deduplicated across all rows.

dry_run.label: Dry Run
dry_run.description: If True, render and log every message but don't SMTP-send. Use for staging.

max_send.label: Max Send
max_send.description: Hard cap on emails sent per run. None = no limit.
